Work Experience

Where I've Worked

Web Developer & Digital Marketer
Nov 2025 — Apr 2026
Al Taqniya LLC — Sharjah Media City (SHAMS), UAE

Website & Development

  • Redesigned and rebuilt the company website from scratch using WordPress, Elementor, custom HTML, CSS & JavaScript.
  • Delivered a fully responsive website integrated with Google Analytics for performance tracking.
  • Applied advanced customization beyond Elementor using vanilla JS and CSS overrides.

E-Commerce & Marketplace

  • End-to-end Shopify store setup — products, SEO-optimized categories, and payment integration.
  • Created AI-generated product images and listed on Noon with SEO-optimized titles.
  • Managed listings on Facebook Marketplace, OpenSooq, Shoofi, and other platforms.
  • Researched spare parts via barcode lookups using Google and Claude AI.

Social Media & Content

  • Managed company social presence on LinkedIn, Facebook, and Instagram.
  • Created AI-edited car and product visuals with relevant hashtag strategies.
  • Handled customer communication and occasionally managed car deals directly.

n8n Automation Projects

  • Built daily real-time weather notification workflow using Weather API.
  • Automated scheduled message sending to multiple Gmail accounts via n8n triggers.
  • Strengthened automation skills through practice workflows ahead of live tasks.

03 / 04
Automation Projects
n8n Workflow Automation Suite

Two production-ready n8n automation workflows — daily weather email alerts and scheduled bulk Gmail messaging — built with real API integrations.

Workflows Built
  • Cron trigger → Weather API → HTML format → Gmail send
  • Schedule trigger → Read list → Loop → Bulk Gmail dispatch
